response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of cloud compute architecture or leadership in distributed systems, and their C++ exposure appears limited to academic or minor projects.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across diverse technologies and domains
Proven mentorship and workshop leadership in testing and software practices
Active open-source contributions and infrastructure automation experience
concerns: Only minimal C++ experience documented, far below the 8-year minimum requirement
No clear evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or distributed systems design at scale
Lacks documented technical leadership roles mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers
